title: Xero shares tumble as AI fears spook investors
description: Xero is trying to claw its way out of the software stock wreckage by leaning into the very force that helped put it there: artificial intelligence.

title: AI Agentic Patent Governs Top Global E-Commerce Instant Delivery: Vatsal Soin Files 0→1 Doctrine
description: New Delhi [India], May 12: Zero to One — Zero-Click Retail. Dynamic Pricing. Dark Stores. Supply Chain Cascade. Return Fraud. Counterfeit Detection. Humanoid Robotics. Blockchain. All Provable. All Accountable. Pre-Execution. From low-value goods to high-value assets, AI agents now price, route, recommend, and dispatch products across global platforms — with no pre-execution proof of what [...] The post AI Agentic Patent Governs Top Global E-Commerce Instant Delivery: Vatsal Soin Files 0→1 Doctrine appeared first on TechBullion .

title: Taiwan's Foxconn reports forecast-beating 19% jump in Q1 profit on AI demand
description: TAIPEI: Taiwan's Foxconn, the world's largest contract electronics maker, reported on Thursday a 19% rise in first-quarter profit versus the same period a year earlier, beating expectations due to strong global demand for AI products.

title: Deep-tech Startup 'Spyne' Takes Its Conversational AI ‘Vini’ Deeper Into Global Auto Retail Workflows
description: Spyne integrates Vini AI with Tekion’s ARC platform to help auto dealers streamline customer engagement, automate workflows, and improve real-time sales and service operations.
